exploration_notes: Optimized Elkan's K-Means algorithm with three changes: (1) Pre-sorted center indices enabling early loop termination via triangle inequality - reducing inner loop from O(k) to O(k'), (2) Reordered pruning conditions for better cache behavior by checking center_half_distances before lower_bounds, (3) Parallelized the O(n*k) bounds update loop using prange/OpenMP. Changes span _k_means_elkan.pyx (Cython hot loops) and _kmeans.py (sorted indices precomputation).
